title: Use These 17 Claude Plugins, It Will Make You 10x Better.
summary: Chase AI reviews 17 Claude plugins, skills, and CLIs organized by category including design, productivity, and data tools. The video demonstrates how to integrate these tools with Claude Code to extend functionality and workflow capabilities.
writeup: Chase AI walks through 17 Claude plugins, skills, and CLIs, grouped into categories such as design, productivity, and data tools. The video demonstrates integrating each with Claude Code to extend its functionality and workflow capabilities. The practical takeaway is a categorized set of tools that expand what Claude Code can do across different task types.
